name: io.github.thru-echoes/trace-mcp
description: TRACE: an MCP server providing a standardized decision-provenance audit trail for AI-assisted research and coding workflows — who proposed what, who accepted or revised it, and why.

environmentVariables.name: TRACE_DEFAULT_PROJECT
environmentVariables.description: Project name to attribute sessions to when one cannot be inferred. Optional.

environmentVariables.name: TRACE_KNOWLEDGE_DIR
environmentVariables.description: Override directory for the optional trace-learn cross-session knowledge store (default ~/.trace/knowledge/). Optional.

environmentVariables.name: OPENAI_API_KEY
environmentVariables.description: Enables the optional LLM backend in the trace-learn extension. Core makes no network calls; if unset, trace-learn falls back to local lexical matching.
